children.name: Esox
children.description: Esox — a genus of pike in the family Esocidae.

children.name: Esox americanus
children.description: The American pickerel is a medium-sized species of North American freshwater predatory fish belonging to the pike family. The genus Esox is placed in the family Esocidae.

children.name: Esox aquitanicus
children.description: Esox aquitanicus — a species in the genus Esox, family Esocidae. Also known as pike.

children.name: Esox cisalpinus
children.description: Esox cisalpinus — a species in the genus Esox, family Esocidae. Also known as pike.

children.name: Esox flaviae
children.description: Esox flaviae — a species in the genus Esox, family Esocidae. Also known as pike.

children.name: Esox lucius
children.description: The northern pike, also known as jack, northern or simply pike, is a species of carnivorous fish of the genus Esox (pikes). It is commonly found in fresh waters of the Northern Hemisphere.

children.name: Esox lucius x Esox aquitanicus
children.description: Esox lucius x Esox aquitanicus — a species in the genus Esox, family Esocidae. Also known as pike.

children.name: Esox masquinongy
children.description: The muskellunge, often shortened to muskie, musky, ski, or lunge, is a species of large freshwater predatory fish native to North America. It is the largest member of the pike family, Esocidae.

children.name: Esox masquinongy x Esox lucius
children.description: Esox masquinongy x Esox lucius — a species in the genus Esox, family Esocidae. Also known as pike.

children.name: Esox niger
children.description: The chain pickerel, also known as Jackfish, Mud Pike, or Southern Pike is a species of freshwater fish in the pike family of order Esociformes. The chain pickerel and the American pickerel belong to the Esox genus of pike.

children.name: Esox reichertii
children.description: Esox reichertii — a species in the genus Esox, family Esocidae. Also known as pike.
